vision.quote_description: Every company has dozens of hours per month trapped in repetitive work: quotes, emails, documents, data copied by hand from one system to another. Our job is to give them back to you.
vision.image_alt: Laptop glowing in the dark with warm reflections on the screen
vision.image_badge: Clear scope and price, written down before we start
vision.vision_description: Almost everyone in your company already uses ChatGPT for something. Very few companies have brought it into their real processes. That's exactly the step we deliver: no revolutions, no vague promises — one process at a time, measuring the hours recovered. We'll also tell you what NOT to automate: that's the part of the craft the hype merchants skip.
vision.mission_description: We don't ask you to change your ERP, CRM or habits: we connect AI to the tools your company already uses. We start from a small, well-scoped case, with scope and price written down before we begin, with your data staying yours. If the pilot works, we scale. If it doesn't, you know within two weeks — not after six months of consulting.

services.visual_chat_q: What price did we quote Rossi last year?
services.visual_chat_a: €12,400, February order. Want me to draft the new quote?

web_dev.title: Process automation

pricing.incentives_description: Incentives vary by province and run out, but in 2026 there are several ways to cover part of the investment. These are the main ones active today:

incentives.title: 180% super-depreciation
incentives.text: For software and AI platforms interconnected with company systems: effective tax benefit up to ~43% of the investment (Italian Law 199/2025, investments 2026–2028).

incentives.title: Funded training
incentives.text: Interprofessional funds (Fondimpresa, Fondirigenti) often cover up to 100% of staff AI training.

incentives.title: Chamber of Commerce vouchers
incentives.text: Italian Chambers of Commerce fund AI consulting and adoption with coverage up to 70% (e.g. Como-Lecco AI Voucher 2026); active calls vary from province to province.

faq.q: Where does my company's data end up?
faq.a: It stays yours. We configure AI services with European data residency where possible, with no training on your data, and we define in writing what the AI can and cannot see. Compliance (privacy and the AI Act) is part of the job, not an extra.

faq.q: We already have a management system — do we need to replace it?
faq.a: No, quite the opposite: we work inside and around the tools you already use. Most AI projects in Italy are exactly this — integration, not replacement.

faq.q: What if nobody in the company ends up using it?
faq.a: That's why every project includes training for the people who will use the automation, and we always start from a process that saves a specific person real time — not from a tech toy.

faq.q: Why do you show prices? Everyone else says "it depends".
faq.a: Because an honest range helps both of us: you immediately know whether we fit your budget, and we only talk to companies that can actually start. The exact price is agreed on the scope, before signing — and anything beyond it goes on the roadmap, not on the invoice.

faq.q: How do I know you can deliver, if you're a young agency?
faq.a: That's exactly why our offers are built to remove your risk: you start with a small project with a clear cost and the bulk is paid on delivered, working results. Trust is built on the first project, not on promises.

pricing.final_cta_text: Take the free check: 10 questions, 3 minutes, and we'll tell you the right starting point for your company.
pricing.faq_description: Straight answers to the most common doubts about data, costs and how we work. No runaround.
pricing.faq_contact_cta: Write to us — we reply within the day

check.description: 10 questions, 3 minutes, no sign-up needed to see your result. At the end we'll tell you where it makes sense to start — and whether it makes sense at all.
questions: Does anyone in your company already use ChatGPT or similar tools for work?
Do you have a management system, CRM or ERP used every day?
Are there tasks where data is copied by hand between systems, emails or spreadsheets?
Does preparing a quote or proposal take hours (or days) of manual work?
Do you often answer the same questions from customers or colleagues?
Are there recurring documents (reports, minutes, files) written from scratch every time?
Is there reasonably organised internal documentation (procedures, price lists, manuals)?
Would there be someone internally available to act as the contact for a pilot project?
Has management discussed AI or automation in the last 6 months?
Do you already know which 2026 incentives you could use (super-depreciation, vouchers, training funds)?

bands.title: Foundations to build
bands.text: There's potential, but some basics are missing (tools, data or an internal sponsor). The right starting point isn't a project: it's a hands-on training session for your team and a light process mapping. Low cost, often fundable.

bands.title: Ready for the first step
bands.text: Your company has at least one process that can be automated with immediate benefit. The right starting point is the First Automation: one process, from €2,900, two weeks, balance due on working delivery.

bands.title: Fertile ground
bands.text: There are multiple automatable processes and the conditions to do it well. The right starting point is the AI Audit: the full map of where to recover hours, with priorities, costs and applicable incentives.

check.form_text: Leave your details and we'll send you the analysis of your score with suggestions for your case. No spam, no cold calls.
check.form_privacy: We use this data only to reply to you. No lists, no sharing with third parties.
check.form_error: Something went wrong. Try again, or write to hello@noxis.agency.
check.success_title: Done. We'll reply within one business day.
check.success_text: Want to skip ahead? Book 20 minutes directly: tell us how you work and we'll tell you right away what's worth automating.

trainingPage.funding_title: Often you don't pay for it:
trainingPage.funding_description: If your company is enrolled in an interprofessional fund (Fondimpresa, Fondirigenti and similar), training is often reimbursable up to 100%. The path is simple:

funding_steps.title: Check your enrolment
funding_steps.text: With your payroll consultant you check which fund the company belongs to — enrolment is free and handled through payroll.

funding_steps.title: Training plan
funding_steps.text: We prepare the programme and the course documentation in the format the fund requires.

funding_steps.title: Delivery and reimbursement
funding_steps.text: The workshop takes place, it's reported, and the fund reimburses the company — often the full amount.

trainingPage.funding_note: Reporting depends on the fund and the active call: we verify it together before starting, without promising anything that isn't written down.
trainingPage.aiact_title: The obligation almost nobody is handling
trainingPage.aiact_text: Since 2 February 2025, art. 4 of the EU AI Act requires companies using AI systems to ensure adequate AI literacy of their staff. The workshop covers the obligation and leaves you with documentation of the completed training.
trainingPage.final_title: Shall we talk about your team?
trainingPage.final_text: Tell us about the company and the processes you run: we'll suggest the right format. And if the company is signed up to an interprofessional training fund, the training is often reimbursable.
